package.name: mujoco_vendor
package.description: Thin ament wrapper exposing the conda-forge MuJoCo C library to ROS2 packages that expect the upstream mujoco_vendor package (mujoco_ros2_control_plugins hard-fails without it). Upstream ships no mujoco_vendor and RoboStack packages none, but conda-forge's libmujoco already installs a full CMake package (mujocoConfig.cmake exporting mujoco::mujoco) — so this only has to re-export it under the ROS name.
